---
title: "A precision-weighted RSA model of referential over-specification in autism"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
---

## The model

$$
P(u) \;\propto\; \underbrace{\prod_{f\in u}\sigma_f \prod_{f\notin u}(1-\sigma_f)}_{P_{\text{Sal}}(u)}
\;\cdot\; \underbrace{L_0(\text{target}\mid u)^{\lambda}}_{\text{informativity}}
\;\cdot\; \underbrace{e^{-\beta|u|}}_{\text{brevity}}
$$

| param | role | varies by |
|---|---|---|
| $\sigma_f$ | bottom-up salience prior (P feature comes to mind): shape, colour, size, plural, singular | shared (object-feature level) |
| $\lambda$ | top-down informativity (avoid under-specification) | shared |
| $\beta$ | top-down brevity/cost (avoid over-specification) | group × experiment ← the autism effect |

## Setup

```{python}
import numpy as np
import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp
from collections import defaultdict
from scipy.optimize import minimize

import data
import model
from model import CELLS, LABELS, trial_arrays, minimize_nll

jax.config.update("jax_enable_x64", True)

TRIALS = data.load_all()
A = trial_arrays(TRIALS)
print(f"{model.NU} legal utterances; {A['cell'].shape[0]} trials")


def strata(A):
    """(experiment, group) -> pid -> [row indices], for stratified resampling."""
    S = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(list))
    for i in range(A["cell"].shape[0]):
        S[(int(A["expi"][i]), A["grp"][i])][A["pid"][i]].append(i)
    return S


def resample_pids(S, rng):
    idx = []
    for pids in S.values():
        ks = list(pids)
        for j in rng.choice(len(ks), len(ks), replace=True):
            idx.extend(pids[ks[j]])
    return jnp.array(idx)


def ci_line(name, point, col):
    lo, hi = np.percentile(col, [2.5, 97.5])
    sig = "***" if (lo < 0) == (hi < 0) else "n.s."
    print(f"{name} = {point:+.3f}  95% CI [{lo:+.3f}, {hi:+.3f}]  {sig}")


STRATA = strata(A)        # (experiment, group) -> pid -> rows, for the participant bootstraps
```

## 1. Fit and the autism effect

```{python}
fit = model.fit(A["cell"], A["occ"], A["dist"], A["uidx"], 4)
print("salience prior sigma [shape, colour, size, plural, singular] =",
      ", ".join(f"{x:.2f}" for x in fit["sigma"]))
print(f"lambda = {fit['lam']:.2f}   AIC = {fit['aic']:.1f}   "
      f"(w_S fixed at 1: full perspective switch under occlusion)")
for lab, b in zip(LABELS, fit["beta"]):
    print(f"  beta[{lab}] = {b:+.2f}")
print(f"\nGROUP CONTRAST (beta_ASD - beta_NT):  "
      f"accuracy {fit['beta'][0] - fit['beta'][1]:+.2f}   "
      f"minimal {fit['beta'][2] - fit['beta'][3]:+.2f}")
```

```{python}
DIMS_ORDER = ("number", "size", "colour", "shape")
emp = data.empirical_rates(TRIALS, "accuracy")


def ppc(experiment):
    """Model P(mention) averaged over the actual trials (per-trial dv/occ/cell)."""
    acc = defaultdict(lambda: [0.0, 0])
    for t in TRIALS:
        if t["experiment"] != experiment or not t["included"]:
            continue
        if (experiment, t["group"]) not in CELLS:
            continue
        dist = model.dist_index(t["dist_dims"])
        p = model.mention_prob(jnp.array(fit["s5"]), fit["lam"],
                            fit["beta"][CELLS[(experiment, t["group"])]],
                            dist, float(t["occlusion"] == "yes"))
        for d in DIMS_ORDER:
            key = (t["occlusion"], t["dist_feature"], t["group"], d)
            acc[key][0] += float(p[model.FEAT[("A", d)]]); acc[key][1] += 1
    return {k: s / n for k, (s, n) in acc.items()}


pred = ppc("accuracy")
print(f"{'occ':>4} {'dist':9s}{'feat':7s}{'ASD model/data':>16s}{'NT model/data':>16s}")
for occ in ("no", "yes"):
    for dist in ("type", "non_type"):
        for dim in DIMS_ORDER:
            print(f"{occ:>4} {dist:9s}{dim:7s}"
                  f"{pred[(occ, dist, 'ASD', dim)]:>9.2f}/{emp[(occ, dist, 'ASD', dim)]:.2f}"
                  f"{pred[(occ, dist, 'NT', dim)]:>11.2f}/{emp[(occ, dist, 'NT', dim)]:.2f}")
```

## 2. Differences, not deficits: where does the group effect live?

```{python}
# per-trial (sigma, lam, w_S, beta) so the group can enter ANY channel
EXPI = np.asarray(A["expi"]); GRP = (A["grp"] != "ASD").astype(int)   # 0=ASD, 1=NT
CELL = np.asarray(A["cell"]); OCC = np.asarray(A["occ"], float)
DISTa = np.asarray(A["dist"]); UIDXj = A["uidx"]; PIDa = A["pid"]; Ntr = CELL.shape[0]

# the model is the memo speaker (model.speaker); vmap it over per-trial params.
_SPK = jax.vmap(model.speaker, in_axes=(0,) * 9)        # (s0..s4, lam, beta, wS, occ) -> [n, dist, u]


def _P(s5, lam, wS, beta, occ):
    """Per-trial speaker distribution [n, dist, u]; s5 is [n, 5], mean-centred here."""
    s5c = s5 - jnp.mean(s5, axis=1, keepdims=True)
    return _SPK(s5c[:, 0], s5c[:, 1], s5c[:, 2], s5c[:, 3], s5c[:, 4], lam, beta, wS, occ)


def _sub(mask):
    return dict(e=jnp.array(EXPI[mask]), g=jnp.array(GRP[mask]), c=jnp.array(CELL[mask]),
                o=jnp.array(OCC[mask]), dist=jnp.array(DISTa[mask]), u=jnp.array(np.asarray(UIDXj)[mask]))


def _pt(kind, th, s):
    # w_S is FIXED at 1 (full perspective switch) everywhere except M_wS, where it
    # is freed per group as the ToM-deficit test.  s5 is broadcast per trial so
    # M_sigma can carry a per-group salience prior (the full bottom-up account).
    n = s["e"].shape[0]; one = jnp.ones(n)
    bc = lambda v: jnp.broadcast_to(v, (n, 5))
    if kind == "M0":
        return bc(th[:5]), jnp.full(n, jax.nn.softplus(th[5])), one, th[6:8][s["e"]]
    if kind == "Mbeta":
        return bc(th[:5]), jnp.full(n, jax.nn.softplus(th[5])), one, th[6:10][s["c"]]
    if kind == "MwS":
        return bc(th[:5]), jnp.full(n, jax.nn.softplus(th[5])), jax.nn.sigmoid(th[6:8])[s["g"]], th[8:10][s["e"]]
    if kind == "Mlam":
        return bc(th[:5]), jax.nn.softplus(th[5:7])[s["g"]], one, th[7:9][s["e"]]
    if kind == "Msig":   # per-group sigma (ASD th[:5], NT th[5:10]); the bottom-up rival
        return jnp.where((s["g"] == 1)[:, None], bc(th[5:10]), bc(th[:5])), \
               jnp.full(n, jax.nn.softplus(th[10])), one, th[11:13][s["e"]]


def _nll(kind, th, s):
    s5, lam_t, wS_t, be_t = _pt(kind, th, s)
    P = _P(s5, lam_t, wS_t, be_t, s["o"])
    n = s["u"].shape[0]
    return -jnp.sum(jnp.log(P[jnp.arange(n), s["dist"], s["u"]] + 1e-12))


INIT = {"M0":   np.r_[np.zeros(5), 2., 0., 0.],
        "Mbeta": np.r_[np.zeros(5), 2., np.zeros(4)],
        "MwS":  np.r_[np.zeros(5), 2., 0., 0., 0., 0.],
        "Mlam": np.r_[np.zeros(5), 2., 2., 0., 0.],
        "Msig": np.r_[np.zeros(10), 2., 0., 0.]}
KP = {"M0": 7, "Mbeta": 9, "MwS": 9, "Mlam": 8, "Msig": 11}  # free params (salience centred; w_S fixed=1 except M_wS)


def _fit(kind, s, x0=None):
    return minimize_nll(lambda th: _nll(kind, th, s), INIT[kind] if x0 is None else x0).x


FULL = _sub(np.ones(Ntr, bool)); RES = {}
for k in INIT:
    x = _fit(k, FULL); nll = float(_nll(k, jnp.array(x), FULL))
    RES[k] = dict(x=x, nll=nll, aic=2 * KP[k] + 2 * nll)
NM = {"Mbeta": "M_beta flexible weighting", "M0": "M0 no group effect",
      "MwS": "M_wS ToM deficit (perspec)", "Mlam": "M_lam pragmatic deficit",
      "Msig": "M_sigma salience diff (bottom-up)"}
base = RES["Mbeta"]["aic"]
print(f"{'model':28s}{'k':>3}{'AIC':>10}{'dAIC':>9}")
for k in ("Mbeta", "M0", "MwS", "Mlam", "Msig"):
    print(f"{NM[k]:28s}{KP[k]:>3}{RES[k]['aic']:>10.1f}{RES[k]['aic'] - base:>+9.1f}")
```

```{python}
# clustering-aware check: AIC treats trials as independent, but they nest in
# participants. 5-fold CV holding out whole participants (stratified by cell).
rng = np.random.default_rng(0); KF = 5; fold_of = {}
for ci in range(4):
    ps = list(rng.permutation(sorted(set(PIDa[CELL == ci]))))
    for j, p in enumerate(ps):
        fold_of[p] = j % KF
tf = np.array([fold_of[p] for p in PIDa])
cv = {k: 0.0 for k in INIT}
for k in INIT:
    for fo in range(KF):
        x = _fit(k, _sub(tf != fo))
        cv[k] += float(_nll(k, jnp.array(x), _sub(tf == fo)))
b = cv["Mbeta"]
print(f"{'model':28s}{'CV nll':>11}{'dCV':>9}   (held-out, lower=better)")
for k in ("Mbeta", "M0", "MwS", "Mlam", "Msig"):
    print(f"{NM[k]:28s}{cv[k]:>11.1f}{cv[k] - b:>+9.1f}")
```

```{python}
xw, xl = RES["MwS"]["x"], RES["Mlam"]["x"]
print("M_wS  w_S:    ASD %.3f  NT %.3f" % (jax.nn.sigmoid(xw[6]), jax.nn.sigmoid(xw[7])))
print("M_lam lambda: ASD %.2f   NT %.2f" % (jax.nn.softplus(xl[5]), jax.nn.softplus(xl[6])))
```

```{python}
# discriminating signature: ASD-NT redundancy gap vs feature salience
# (accuracy, occlusion-absent, TYPE trials: all non-type features redundant)
emp = data.empirical_rates(TRIALS, "accuracy")
sig = dict(zip(("shape", "colour", "size", "plural"), fit["sigma"]))
print(f"{'feature':9s}{'salience':>10s}{'ASD-NT gap':>12s}")
for d, key in (("colour", "colour"), ("size", "size"), ("number", "plural")):
    gap = emp[("no", "type", "ASD", d)] - emp[("no", "type", "NT", d)]
    print(f"{d:9s}{sig[key]:>10.2f}{gap:>+12.2f}")
```

## 3. Flexible weighting: $\beta$ as a graded function of autistic traits

```{python}
def unpack_srs(th):
    s5 = th[:5] - jnp.mean(th[:5])
    lam = jax.nn.softplus(th[5])
    return s5, lam, th[6:8], th[8:10]


def nll_srs(th, expi, z, occ, dist, ui):
    s5, lam, b0, b_srs = unpack_srs(th)               # s5 already centred
    beta = b0[expi] + b_srs[expi] * z                 # per-trial brevity weight
    n = beta.shape[0]
    P = _SPK(*(jnp.full(n, s5[k]) for k in range(5)),
             jnp.full(n, lam), beta, jnp.ones(n), occ.astype(jnp.float64))   # [n, dist, u]
    return -jnp.sum(jnp.log(P[jnp.arange(n), dist, ui] + 1e-12))


vgs = jax.jit(jax.value_and_grad(nll_srs))


def fit_srs(sub, th0):
    def f(x):
        v, g = vgs(jnp.array(x), sub["expi"], sub["z"], sub["occ"],
                   sub["dist"], sub["uidx"])
        return float(v), np.asarray(g)

    return minimize(f, th0, jac=True, method="L-BFGS-B").x


th0 = np.r_[np.zeros(5), 2.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
full = fit_srs(A, th0)
b_srs = np.asarray(unpack_srs(jnp.array(full))[3])
zmean = {g: float(np.mean(np.asarray(A["z"])[A["grp"] == g])) for g in ("ASD", "NT")}

# participant bootstrap (stratified by experiment x group)
rng = np.random.default_rng(0)
boots = []
for _ in range(300):
    ix = resample_pids(STRATA, rng)
    sub = {k: A[k][ix] for k in ("expi", "z", "occ", "dist", "uidx")}
    boots.append(np.asarray(unpack_srs(jnp.array(fit_srs(sub, full)))[3]))
boots = np.array(boots)

print(f"SRS: mean {A['srs_mu']:.1f}, sd {A['srs_sd']:.1f}; "
      f"z_ASD = {zmean['ASD']:+.2f}, z_NT = {zmean['NT']:+.2f}\n")
for j, name in enumerate(("accuracy", "minimal")):
    ci_line(f"beta_srs[{name:9s}]", b_srs[j], boots[:, j])
ci_line("\ntrait x instruction interaction (acc - min slope)",
        b_srs[0] - b_srs[1], boots[:, 0] - boots[:, 1])
```

## 4. Robustness and model recovery

```{python}
# the autism contrast is invariant to the occlusion term: re-fit with the original
# heuristic occlusion and compare to the Eq. 2 posterior used throughout.
_M = jnp.array(model.MENTION); _NC = jnp.array(model.NCOST); _SM = model.SAL_MAP
def _heur(s5, lam, beta, occ, dist):
    sigma = jnp.clip(jax.nn.sigmoid((s5 - jnp.mean(s5))[_SM]), 1e-6, 1 - 1e-6)
    lp = _M @ jnp.log(sigma) + (1.0 - _M) @ jnp.log1p(-sigma)
    comp = 1.0 - _M[:, dist]                              # competitor consistent iff dist-dim omitted
    Ue = -jnp.log(1.0 + comp)
    Ua = jnp.mean(-jnp.log(1.0 + comp[:, None] + (1.0 - _M)), axis=1)
    return jax.nn.softmax(lp + lam * (occ * Ua + (1 - occ) * Ue) - beta * _NC)
_hspk = jax.vmap(_heur, in_axes=(None, None, 0, 0, 0))
def _hnll(th):
    s5, lam, be = th[:5], jax.nn.softplus(th[5]), th[6:10]
    P = _hspk(s5, lam, be[A["cell"]], A["occ"].astype(jnp.float64), A["dist"])
    return -jnp.sum(jnp.log(P[jnp.arange(P.shape[0]), A["uidx"]] + 1e-12))
_hb = minimize_nll(_hnll, np.concatenate([np.zeros(5), [2.0], np.zeros(4)])).x[6:10]
_eb = fit["beta"]
print("autism contrast (beta_ASD - beta_NT) by occlusion term:")
print(f"  Eq. 2 posterior:  acc {_eb[0]-_eb[1]:+.2f}   min {_eb[2]-_eb[3]:+.2f}")
print(f"  heuristic:        acc {_hb[0]-_hb[1]:+.2f}   min {_hb[2]-_hb[3]:+.2f}")
```

```{python}
rng_c = np.random.default_rng(0)
point_b = fit["beta"]
gaps = []
for _ in range(300):
    ix = resample_pids(STRATA, rng_c)
    b = model.fit(A["cell"][ix], A["occ"][ix], A["dist"][ix], A["uidx"][ix], 4)["beta"]
    gaps.append([float(b[0] - b[1]), float(b[2] - b[3])])
gaps = np.array(gaps)
for j, nm_ in enumerate(("accuracy", "minimal")):
    ci_line(f"beta_ASD-beta_NT [{nm_:8s}]", point_b[2*j] - point_b[2*j+1], gaps[:, j])
ci_line("experiment difference (acc - min gap)",
        float(point_b[0]-point_b[1]-point_b[2]+point_b[3]), gaps[:, 0] - gaps[:, 1])
```

```{python}
import csv as _csv, os as _os
_status = {}
for _f in ("accuracy_ASD.csv", "minimal_ASD.csv"):
    for _r in _csv.DictReader(open(_os.path.join(data.DATA_DIR, _f))):
        _status[_r["prolific_pid"]] = _r["autistic"]
clin = np.array([not (A["grp"][i] == "ASD" and "clinical" not in _status.get(A["pid"][i], "").lower())
                 for i in range(Ntr)])
cix = jnp.array(np.where(clin)[0])
nA = {e: len({A["pid"][i] for i in range(Ntr) if A["grp"][i] == "ASD" and int(A["expi"][i]) == e and clin[i]})
      for e in (0, 1)}
fc = model.fit(A["cell"][cix], A["occ"][cix], A["dist"][cix], A["uidx"][cix], 4)["beta"]
print(f"clinical-only ASD: accuracy n={nA[0]}, minimal n={nA[1]}")
print(f"  contrast acc {fc[0]-fc[1]:+.3f}   min {fc[2]-fc[3]:+.3f}   "
      f"(full sample: acc {point_b[0]-point_b[1]:+.3f}, min {point_b[2]-point_b[3]:+.3f})")
```

```{python}
def _simulate(true_kind, theta, key):
    s5_t, lam_t, wS_t, be_t = _pt(true_kind, jnp.array(theta), FULL)
    n = FULL["dist"].shape[0]
    Pu = _P(s5_t, lam_t, wS_t, be_t, FULL["o"])[jnp.arange(n), FULL["dist"]]   # [n, NU]
    keys = jax.random.split(key, n)
    return jax.vmap(lambda kk, p: jax.random.choice(kk, model.NU, p=p))(keys, Pu)


s5b = RES["M0"]["x"][:5]; lamb = RES["M0"]["x"][5]
ba, bm = RES["M0"]["x"][6], RES["M0"]["x"][7]          # shared baseline (no-group fit)
s5_nt = s5b.copy(); s5_nt[1] -= 1.5; s5_nt[2] -= 1.5    # NT lower colour/size salience
TRUE = {"M0":   RES["M0"]["x"],
        "Mbeta": RES["Mbeta"]["x"],                    # the real (modest) group effect
        "MwS":  np.r_[s5b, lamb, 6.0, 0.0, ba, bm],    # w_S logits: ASD~1, NT~.5; then beta[ba,bm]
        "Mlam": np.r_[s5b, model.inv_softplus(7.0), model.inv_softplus(3.5), ba, bm],
        "Msig": np.r_[s5b, s5_nt, lamb, ba, bm]}
KINDS = ["M0", "Mbeta", "MwS", "Mlam", "Msig"]
R = 10
print("induced acc/occ-absent colour gap (ASD-NT) per generating model:")
for tk in KINDS:
    s5_t, lam_t, wS_t, be_t = _pt(tk, jnp.array(TRUE[tk]), FULL)
    n = FULL["dist"].shape[0]
    Pu = _P(s5_t, lam_t, wS_t, be_t, FULL["o"])[jnp.arange(n), FULL["dist"]]
    m = (Pu @ jnp.array(model.MENTION))[:, model.FEAT[("A", "colour")]]
    msk = (FULL["e"] == 0) & (FULL["o"] == 0)
    print(f"  {tk:6s} {float(jnp.mean(m[msk & (FULL['g']==0)]) - jnp.mean(m[msk & (FULL['g']==1)])):+.2f}")
print(f"\nconfusion matrix (rows=true, cols=recovered by min AIC), R={R}")
print("true\\rec  " + "".join(f"{k:>6}" for k in KINDS))
for tk in KINDS:
    cnt = {k: 0 for k in KINDS}
    for r in range(R):
        u = _simulate(tk, TRUE[tk], jax.random.PRNGKey(100 * KINDS.index(tk) + r))
        sub = {**FULL, "u": u}
        aic = {k: 2 * KP[k] + 2 * float(_nll(k, jnp.array(_fit(k, sub)), sub)) for k in KINDS}
        cnt[min(aic, key=aic.get)] += 1
    print(f"{tk:>7}  " + "".join(f"{cnt[k]:>6}" for k in KINDS))
```
